hero.title: AI-Powered Data & BPO Services Built to Scale.
hero.description: From AI training data and intelligent document processing to full back-office outsourcing, Claritex delivers accuracy, speed and compliance at enterprise scale.

servicesOverview.label: Our Services
servicesOverview.title: Intelligent Data Solutions for High-Performance Businesses
servicesOverview.description: Our specialists deliver scalable AI and BPO outsourcing to manage, optimise and leverage your data for real business results.

cards.title: AI Services
cards.desc: End-to-end AI model training, data annotation, prompt engineering, QA and strategy powering next-gen products with ground-truth quality.

cards.title: Data Collection
cards.desc: Reliable data collection that captures and structures high-quality information from multiple sources for real-time insights and stronger decisions.

cards.title: Data Management
cards.desc: Data management that organises, secures and optimises information so teams have reliable access and better operating leverage.

cards.title: Document Processing
cards.desc: Intelligent document processing that digitises, extracts and validates critical records, boosting accuracy and accelerating workflows.

cards.title: Data Entry & Solutions
cards.desc: Accurate, scalable data entry services that reduce manual work and help teams focus on growth and customer success.

cards.title: Hire Remote Team
cards.desc: The right remote talent without the overhead: trained specialists aligned to your timezone, quality standards and business goals.

ai.label: Artificial Intelligence
ai.title: AI Services That Power Your Next-Gen Products
ai.description: We combine human expertise with intelligent tooling to deliver the training data, annotation and advisory services AI-driven companies need to build, train and scale.

items.title: AI Model Training
items.desc: High-quality annotated datasets and labelling pipelines built to spec, giving your ML models the data they need to generalise at scale.

items.title: Data Annotation
items.desc: Precision labelling for text, image, video, audio and multimodal datasets with human-in-the-loop QA at every stage.

items.title: Prompt Engineering
items.desc: LLM fine-tuning support, prompt optimisation and RLHF data preparation for GPT, Claude, Llama and custom foundation models.

items.title: AI Quality Assurance
items.desc: Dedicated review layers that catch what automated pipelines miss, keeping model outputs accurate, safe and production-ready.

items.title: AI Strategy & Consulting
items.desc: From proof-of-concept to production: strategy, model selection, compliance frameworks and responsible AI deployment.

items.title: MLOps Data Support
items.desc: Ongoing dataset maintenance, versioning support and retraining pipelines to keep your models sharp as the world evolves.

bpo.label: Outsourcing & BPO
bpo.title: All Outsourcing Support Functions Under One Roof
bpo.description: Every back-office and data function your business needs, from a single specialist to a full dedicated team, delivered with accuracy, security and measurable SLAs.

items.desc: Capture structured, verified data from any source: web, documents, APIs or custom research workflows.
Organise, cleanse, enrich and govern your data assets so every team has reliable, consistent and actionable information.
Intelligent extraction, digitisation and validation of any business document, eliminating manual handling at enterprise scale.
Accurate, scalable data entry across every vertical, from logistics and real estate to mortgage and eCommerce.
Full-function back-office outsourcing that keeps your operations running smoothly without the overhead of in-house headcount.
Dedicated, trained professionals aligned to your workflows, timezone and quality standards, ready to scale up or down on demand.

about.label: Our Company
about.title: A Leading Data Services & BPO Partner Delivering Accuracy, Speed & Growth
about.paragraph1: Founded to bridge the gap between cutting-edge AI capability and operational business need, Claritex has grown into a global team of specialists delivering accurate, secure and scalable services to enterprises across six continents.
about.paragraph2: From AI model training and data annotation through to resume formatting, invoice processing and full back-office outsourcing, every service is built on domain expertise, rigorous quality and commitment to measurable outcomes.

items.title: Resume Formatting for a UK Staffing Firm
items.desc: A leading UK staffing firm outsourced all resume formatting to Claritex. Recruiters now focus entirely on placing talent, not fixing CVs.

items.title: AI-Powered Invoice Processing for Global Freight
items.desc: A global freight operator replaced manual AP workflows with intelligent invoice extraction and gained real-time visibility across 12 countries.

items.title: Automating Resume Data from Handshake
items.desc: A US recruitment firm automated candidate intake from Handshake, eliminating manual entry and standardising candidate profiles.

items.title: Business Listing Extraction for Global Consulting
items.desc: A UK consulting firm automated business listing extraction and achieved fully verified data with much broader market intelligence.

items.title: Requirement Assessment
items.desc: We analyse your workflows, data volumes, compliance needs and accuracy benchmarks to design an optimised processing strategy.

items.title: Secure Data Intake
items.desc: Data is securely received, encrypted, validated and standardised to ensure integrity before processing begins.

items.title: Intelligent Processing
items.desc: Advanced automation combined with expert human validation ensures high accuracy, faster turnaround and seamless system integration.

items.title: QA & Delivery
items.desc: Multi-level quality checks guarantee precision and timely delivery, every output verified against your agreed SLA.
